title: phyla scaberrima
intro: Phyla scaberrima, also known as Texas frogfruit, is a perennial herb native to eastern North America, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Phyla scaberrima have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory problems, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phyla scaberrima can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
